Surrounded by peaks such as Koyamano-dake and Bunagatake, this mountain offers multiple climbing routes with varying difficulty levels, including technical sections like the Aogare Course. The summit provides views of Lake Biwa, making it an excellent destination. Spring is the ideal climbing season.
